Exit Condition ('Infinite Loop')"}], "description": "### Impact

An attacker who uses this vulnerability can craft a PDF which leads to an infinite loop. This requires extracting the text in layout mode.

### Patches

This has been fixed in [pypdf==6.13.0](https://github.com/py-pdf/pypdf/releases/tag/6.13.0).

### Workarounds

If you cannot upgrade yet, consider applying the changes from PR [#3830](https://github.com/py-pdf/pypdf/pull/3830).", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00123, "percentile": 0.02409}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-52x6-gq3r-vpf4", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-16T14:05:40Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-52x6-gq3r-vpf4", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-52x6-gq3r-vpf4"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-54530"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-16T14:05:40Z", "references": ["https://github.com/py-pdf/pypdf/security/advisories/GHSA-52x6-gq3r-vpf4", "https://github.com/py-pdf/pypdf/pull/3830", "https://github.com/py-pdf/pypdf/releases/tag/6.13.0", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-52x6-gq3r-vpf4"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/py-pdf/pypdf/security-advisories/GHSA-52x6-gq3r-vpf4", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/py-pdf/pypdf", "summary": "pypdf: Possible infinite loop when retrieving fonts for layout-mode text extraction", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-16T14:05:43Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-52x6-gq3r-vpf4", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "6.13.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "pypdf"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 6.13.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: pypdf: Possible infinite loop when retrieving fonts for layout-mode text extraction
